RemoveIpAddressFromIpGroup.ipSetId: The ID of the IP address group
RemoveIpAddressFromIpGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
RemoveIpAddressFromIpGroup.ipAddressInfo: Information of the IP addresses to be removed, with a maximum of 10 entries per request
